name: HelpWithActivation
description: Customer needs guidance on how to activate their new Virgin Media service, equipment, or included subscription — such as self-installing broadband via quickstart, setting up a TV box, or activating a Netflix or Disney+ subscription. They have not yet attempted or are partway through the process and need instructions, not troubleshooting for a failed activation.
